poses.name: Arms Crossed
tips: keep shoulders relaxed
chin slightly down for stronger jaw line

poses.name: Arms Raised Celebration
tips: reach tall through fingertips
soft knee bend for energy
chin slightly lifted, open chest

poses.name: Back to Camera
tips: turn shoulders away; soft glance over one side optional
weight even or slight hip shift
hands relaxed at sides or in pockets

camera_cues: full body; slight low angle; city or trail
poses.name: Backpack Over-Shoulder Turn
tips: torso 3/4 to camera; look back over shoulder
one strap on; free hand on pack edge

camera_cues: full body 3/4; street background bokeh optional
poses.name: Bike Lean
tips: lean hip against bike; free hand on handlebar
weight on standing leg; soft smile to lens

camera_cues: waist-up seated; soft window side light
poses.name: Book Reading (seated)
tips: hold book at mid-chest; elbows soft
chin slightly down toward page; eyes toward lens on cue

poses.name: Chin Rest on Hand
tips: elbow on table or knee; knuckles under chin lightly
eyes soft toward camera or slightly off-axis

camera_cues: slight low angle to emphasize height
poses.name: Classic At Ease
tips: feet shoulder-width apart, weight evenly distributed
arms relaxed at sides with slight fist curl
chin level, eyes forward for a confident stance

poses.name: Coffee Cup (both hands)
tips: hold mug near sternum with both hands
soft smile; steam / cup as lower-third interest

poses.name: Coffee Table Lean
tips: forearms on table; torso slightly forward
shoulders soft; gaze past camera or to lens

poses.name: Contrapposto
tips: weight on one leg
soft s-curve in the torso
relax the free shoulder

poses.name: Crossed Arms Stand
tips: arms lightly crossed at chest; shoulders relaxed
weight on one leg; soft smile to lens

poses.name: Crouch Ready
tips: weight on balls of feet
knees soft, chest open toward camera
hands free near thighs or lightly clasped

poses.name: Hand on Chin
tips: light fingertips on chin; no hard press
shoulders soft; neck long
eyes slightly above camera or off to side

camera_cues: waist-up or full body with negative space on wave side
poses.name: Hand Wave
tips: raise one hand near shoulder height
soft smile, open torso to camera

poses.name: Hands Behind Back
tips: interlace fingers lightly behind the lower back
roll shoulders back without puffing the chest
shift weight onto one foot for a natural s-curve

poses.name: Hands Clasped in Front
tips: clasp hands loosely in front at belt height
keep shoulders relaxed and chest open
straight spine with a slight forward head tilt for approachability

poses.name: Hands in Pockets
tips: thumbs out of pockets for natural hands
slight lean into the wall

camera_cues: full body if background is strong
poses.name: Hands on Hips
tips: elbows soft
weight on back leg

camera_cues: waist-up; open sky or soft backlight
poses.name: Hat Tip
tips: fingers lightly touch brim; elbow soft
chin slightly down; eyes to lens

poses.name: Jump Mid-Air
tips: shoot peak hang time
point toes and lengthen through arms
keep face relaxed; strong core

poses.name: Kneel Profile
tips: kneel tall through the spine
front knee soft; back foot relaxed
chin slightly lifted off the shoulder

poses.name: Kneel Propose
tips: front knee at 90°
upright chest
soft smile to camera

poses.name: Laptop Desk (seated)
tips: sit upright; screen slightly below eye line
hands on keyboard; shoulders relaxed

poses.name: Lean Forward
tips: hinge from hips, not rounded upper back
weight mostly on front foot
hands free or lightly clasped

poses.name: Lean Forward Desk
tips: elbows on desk
lean slightly toward camera

poses.name: Lean on Rail
tips: elbow soft on the rail
hips back slightly

poses.name: Lean Wall Casual
tips: one shoulder to wall
soft knee bend
look past camera

poses.name: Leaning on Rail
tips: lean back slightly with elbows resting on a railing or ledge
one foot crossed over the other at ankle level
tilt head slightly for a candid feel

camera_cues: shallow depth for bokeh street lights
poses.name: Look Down Phone
tips: hold phone at chest height, elbows soft
chin slightly down toward the screen
weight on one leg for a natural hip shift

poses.name: Looking Away
tips: chin slightly down
eyes toward the light source

camera_cues: full body; slight high angle optional
poses.name: One Knee Down
tips: one knee on ground; upright torso
hands free or clasped; look to subject or lens

poses.name: Over the Shoulder
tips: twist torso gently
chin toward shoulder

poses.name: Palm Up Explain
tips: both palms facing up at waist height suggests openness
slight forward lean engages the viewer
keep elbows close to the torso for natural framing

camera_cues: waist-up or three-quarter; phone in lower third
poses.name: Phone Scroll (looking down)
tips: chin slightly down toward phone at chest height
elbows soft; keep face lit from above or window side

poses.name: Point Forward
tips: extend arm fully without locking elbow hard
eyes follow the point
plant front foot toward camera direction

poses.name: Power Stance
tips: feet shoulder-width
shoulders back
chin level

poses.name: Seated Profile
tips: sit tall with weight on one hip
turn shoulders slightly toward camera
hands relaxed on lap or chair arm

camera_cues: head-and-shoulders or waist-up, arm in frame
poses.name: Selfie Peace Sign
tips: raise hand near cheek with peace (v) sign
slight head tilt, eyes to lens

poses.name: Side Profile Look
tips: chin slightly forward
far shoulder drop for length

camera_cues: full body side; 1/125s+ shutter for freeze
poses.name: Side Profile Walk
tips: walk parallel to camera; mid-stride
chin level; arms natural swing

poses.name: Sit Cross-Legged
tips: sit tall through the spine
hands rest on knees or one hand supports behind
soft gaze off-camera

poses.name: Sit on Stool
tips: perch on the front edge of the stool
cross ankles lightly for a clean line
hands on thighs or one on the seat

poses.name: Stretch Reach
tips: reach long through fingertips
keep ribs stacked over pelvis
ground through both feet evenly

camera_cues: full body 3/4; low street angle optional
poses.name: Umbrella Walk
tips: hold umbrella slightly ahead and above forehead
stride mid-step; free hand relaxed at side

poses.name: Walk Toward Camera
tips: mid-stride freeze
front foot toward camera

poses.name: Wall Lean
tips: place one shoulder and hip lightly against the wall
cross ankles or rest the free foot on the toe
keep chin slightly down for a soft gaze

camera_cues: soft window light from the side
poses.name: Weight Shift Standing
tips: shift most weight to one hip
let the free leg bend slightly at the knee
keep shoulders level for a relaxed look

camera_cues: waist-up; window as key light; clean background
poses.name: Window Gaze
tips: stand beside window; face soft light
hands relaxed; eyes slightly off-camera

poses.name: Window Light Stand
tips: face the window at 45 degrees
far shoulder slightly back

poses.name: Yoga Tree Pose
tips: press standing foot firmly into floor
knee opens to side without twisting hips
hands at heart or overhead with soft shoulders
